responseBehaviour: Answer from campaign data. Open discount pop-up during pre-launch.
notes: Do not send to a random article or mini-game.

responseBehaviour: Answer from approved rules. Link directly to full rules or relevant game explanation.
notes: FAQ may supply the approved factual answer.

detectionGuidance: where is|find|show me|open|take me to|name generator|ChumDrop|Know Your Chum
responseBehaviour: Identify the exact destination and provide a text link or interface action.

detectionGuidance: Semantic match against approved FAQ questions and alternatives
responseBehaviour: Return canonical answer, active-dog wrapper and relevant CTA.
notes: FAQ is a source layer as well as a user-intent family.

responseBehaviour: Answer from dog database or link to a specific article, Know Your Chum or Britain's Dog History.
notes: Prefer a precise article over an essay index.

detectionGuidance: Question match against controlled knowledge records
responseBehaviour: Answer only when the canonical record exists. Add a dog joke and redirect.
notes: Collie has the broadest bank. Other dogs may transfer.

bucket: Facts about the active dog or breed
responseBehaviour: Answer from active breed library in character.
notes: Health answers remain general and never diagnose.

detectionGuidance: food/sniffing -> Labrador; jokes -> Boxer; investigations/history -> Terrier
responseBehaviour: Current dog acknowledges its limit and transfers with original context.
notes: Higher layers must check safety and FAQ before a transfer.

responseBehaviour: Acknowledge contact, reveal personality and assign a useful direction.
notes: The dog never speaks before the first user message.

detectionGuidance: test|testing|is this working|bot|AI|real|hear me|what are you
responseBehaviour: Make the test itself the joke, then offer a useful route.
notes: Do not claim to be live support or a human.

detectionGuidance: sit|stay|fetch|help|do something|surprise me|show me|tell me|take me
responseBehaviour: Interpret the command literally, improve the brief and choose an action.
notes: Surprise Me can select any unused destination.

detectionGuidance: I have|my dog|I like|I love|bored|sad|angry|good dog|clever|stupid|thanks
responseBehaviour: Acknowledge the relevant emotion or statement, then choose a related route.
notes: Distress receives a gentle response, not sarcasm.

detectionGuidance: Recognised word with no usable intent
responseBehaviour: Treat the input as an unexplained object or noun and ask for purpose through a redirect.

detectionGuidance: keyboard sequence|repeated characters|punctuation only|single letter|unknown string
responseBehaviour: Use keyboard-accident or head-tilt response, then recommend something useful.
notes: Final fallback if no higher layer matches.
